violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Many opened food items opened undated in prep cooler and walk-in cooler.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Prep cooler needs to be cleaned.
